summary: Reference matrix for class, interface, inheritance, descriptor, and reflection behavior.

cases.upstream_intent: Basic class inheritance must remain a stable baseline.
cases.zr_contract: Derived types inherit base members through explicit prototype or type metadata.
cases.expected_outcome: derived classes access inherited members correctly
assertions: type metadata records the base relationship
runtime resolves inherited members through the prototype chain
project fixture observes inherited behavior

return: derived classes access inherited members correctly

parity.skip_reason: binary parity is covered by project/runtime suites; this reference case keeps per-case executable parity optional until manifest-driven parity is wired

binary.skip_reason: project/runtime suites already prove binary execution; this reference case keeps per-case executable parity disabled until the manifest runner can require executed_via=binary

cases.upstream_intent: Property descriptors need a positive baseline before negative precedence cases.
cases.zr_contract: Property descriptors expose getter and setter behavior through member descriptors.
cases.expected_outcome: property accessors behave through descriptor metadata
assertions: descriptor metadata records getter and setter presence
runtime invokes the descriptor path
artifact preserves property member descriptors

return: property accessors behave through descriptor metadata

cases.upstream_intent: Broken super lookups require deterministic diagnostics.
cases.zr_contract: Invalid super-member references fail as descriptor or inheritance diagnostics.
assertions: diagnostic names the missing inherited member
runtime never falls back to unrelated prototype names
artifact omits a bogus bound member

parity.skip_reason: binary parity is covered by project/runtime suites; this reference case keeps per-case executable parity optional until manifest-driven parity is wired

binary.skip_reason: project/runtime suites already prove binary execution; this reference case keeps per-case executable parity disabled until the manifest runner can require executed_via=binary

cases.upstream_intent: Incorrect binding of instance and static methods should be caught early.
cases.zr_contract: Method binding validates receiver kind and member descriptor kind before execution.
cases.expected_outcome: invalid method binding fails with member-kind diagnostics
assertions: descriptor kind is explicit in metadata
runtime rejects the wrong receiver kind
artifact preserves the bound-member form

exception: invalid method binding fails with member-kind diagnostics

binary.skip_reason: project/runtime suites already prove binary execution; this reference case keeps per-case executable parity disabled until the manifest runner can require executed_via=binary

cases.upstream_intent: Inheritance changes often regress field layout or metadata ordering.
cases.zr_contract: Field layout remains stable across inheritance depth and descriptor insertion.
cases.expected_outcome: field offsets and reflection order remain stable
assertions: reflection reports fields in documented order
runtime field reads respect the stored layout
artifact keeps the field metadata order

return: field offsets and reflection order remain stable
cleanup_trace: reflection reports fields in documented order
artifact keeps the field metadata order

cases.upstream_intent: Static and instance member boundaries need explicit coverage.
cases.zr_contract: Static members and instance members stay distinct descriptor kinds with different receiver requirements.
cases.expected_outcome: static and instance access behave differently and predictably
assertions: descriptor metadata records the static flag
instance lookup does not fall back to static access
artifact preserves descriptor kind

return: static and instance access behave differently and predictably

cases.upstream_intent: Descriptors and method binding interact in subtle ways that need combined coverage.
cases.zr_contract: Descriptor binding and method binding compose through one member resolution path.
cases.expected_outcome: descriptor-provided methods bind with the expected receiver
assertions: member resolution records one descriptor path
runtime receiver binding is explicit
artifact preserves descriptor and bound-method metadata

return: descriptor-provided methods bind with the expected receiver

cases.upstream_intent: Reflection and construction metadata need a combined roundtrip case.
cases.zr_contract: Reflection exposes constructor and inheritance metadata without using type-name heuristics.
cases.expected_outcome: reflection and construction metadata remain aligned
assertions: reflection exposes constructor signatures
artifact reload keeps the same metadata
project fixture observes the same type identity

return: reflection and construction metadata remain aligned

cases.upstream_intent: Super-call behavior often regresses when method lookup changes.
cases.zr_contract: Super calls keep explicit owner and receiver metadata so that overriding remains stable.
cases.expected_outcome: super calls remain stable across descriptor refactors
assertions: compiler records the owner type for super
runtime dispatches to the intended base method
project fixture observes expected override behavior

return: super calls remain stable across descriptor refactors

cases.upstream_intent: Property metadata should remain visible after artifact or reflection refactors.
cases.zr_contract: Reflection retains property descriptor metadata across source and binary paths.
cases.expected_outcome: reflection preserves property metadata after reload
assertions: artifact records property member kinds
runtime reflection shows getter and setter metadata
project fixture sees the same reflected shape

cases.upstream_intent: Python dunder conventions are not the same as ZR member contracts.
cases.zr_contract: ZR does not use Python special method names as a hidden descriptor protocol in compiler or runtime core.
cases.expected_outcome: dunder names alone do not enable descriptor semantics
assertions: compiler queries descriptor metadata instead of string names
runtime does not branch on dunder spellings
artifact preserves explicit descriptor kinds only

return: dunder names alone do not enable descriptor semantics

binary.skip_reason: project/runtime suites already prove binary execution; this reference case keeps per-case executable parity disabled until the manifest runner can require executed_via=binary

cases.upstream_intent: JavaScript-style prototype write fallback should not leak into ZR field semantics accidentally.
cases.zr_contract: ZR does not silently route instance field writes through prototype-name fallback rules.
cases.expected_outcome: instance writes do not mutate prototype members through name-based fallback
assertions: runtime write path stays on explicit member descriptors
prototype mutation requires an explicit target
project fixture observes separate instance and prototype state

return: instance writes do not mutate prototype members through name-based fallback
